theme_and_archetype.description: A cinematic, editorial, and highly immersive digital experience designed to evoke wanderlust and intimate transformation for mature women. The site prioritizes generous spacing, rich typography, full-viewport imagery, and elegant glassmorphism over standard corporate layouts.
theme_and_archetype.tone: Empowering, refined, warm, adventurous, deeply feminine without being delicate, editorial, personal.

display.usage: Hero sections, primary headings, pull quotes.

body.usage: Editorial body text, UI elements, paragraphs.

rules.heading_spacing: tracking-tight for display text larger than text-3xl
rules.uppercase_labels: All caps for accent labels (Montserrat) to create editorial structure.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use 2x to 3x generous spacing. Minimum padding for major sections is py-20, optimal is py-32.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento grids with asymmetry. Use overlapping elements and empty columns to create negative space.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense text. Never center everything. Let layout breath.

glassmorphism.usage: Site-wide for cards, sticky headers, modals, overlay panels.
glassmorphism.inner_glow: Add a subtle inner box-shadow (e.g., inset 0 0 20px rgba(255,255,255,0.05)) to simulate premium frosted glass.
glassmorphism.dark_mode_alternative: For dark sections (like Charity Teaser), use bg-black/20 with border-white/10.

buttons.primary: Glassmorphism with white border, Montserrat uppercase, warm gold accent on hover.
buttons.admin_buttons: Solid colors based on action (Green=Add, Blue=Replace, Red=Remove). Large text (text-lg), generous padding (px-8 py-4), high contrast text.

cards.experience_pillars: Glass cards over a rich image background. Subtle hover translation (-translate-y-2).
cards.pricing: 3 glass tier cards. The middle 'Most Popular' card must have a warm gold border (border-[#C9A96E]).

forms.style: Transparent backgrounds with bottom border only (border-b), or fully frosted glass inputs. Montserrat labels.

home.hero: Cinematic full-viewport (h-screen) slideshow, 5 slides, Ken Burns effect (slow scale), crossfade transitions. Frosted glass sticky nav overlaid.
home.manifesto: Editorial split section. One side deep green background with Cormorant Garamond pull-quote, other side off-white with body text.
home.experience_pillars: Rich background image overlaid with 3 glass cards (Small Group, Maleny Retreats, Corporate).
home.maleny_retreat: Two-column feature, clip-path image reveal on scroll, inline tags (create, explore, feel, taste, transform).
home.testimonials: Horizontal scroll carousel. Use Framer Motion for smooth drag/scroll.
home.charity_teaser: Dark green base (#2D4A3E), masonry image collage, high contrast white serif text.
home.footer: Generous spacing (py-32). Quick-enquiry form with glass inputs.

pages.gallery: Masonry grid layout, filter tabs, lightbox with video support.
pages.charity: Hero section, impact stat counters, alternating story rows (image left, text right).
pages.pricing: 3 tier glass cards, middle highlighted with gold. FAQ accordion.
pages.contact: Split info and validated form. Glassmorphism styling.

admin.design_rules: No glassmorphism here. Pure function. High contrast (#FFFFFF background, #1C1C1C text). Minimum text size text-lg. Color-coded action buttons (Green/Blue/Red). Clear table layouts.
admin.features: Login with MFA, Dashboard, Hero Manager, Gallery Manager, Charity Manager, Submissions Table, Settings.

global_elements.mobile_cta: Sticky 'Book a Discovery Call' button fixed to bottom on mobile.

hero_slideshow.description: Lone tree in foggy landscape (Maleny hinterland vibe)
Mature woman looking out over rocky hillside
Woman among tall trees in tranquil forest
Group of people relaxing on a wooden porch
Luxury hallway leading to the ocean

accessibility_and_motion.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion CSS query. Use fluid, momentum-based scrolling (Lenis).
accessibility_and_motion.animations: Ken Burns (slow scale 1 to 1.1) for hero, parallax on scroll, soft fade-in for glass cards.
accessibility_and_motion.contrast: Ensure text over glass meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio. Use text-shadow if necessary over images.

testing_attributes.requirement: All buttons, forms, nav links, admin controls MUST have a data-testid. Examples: data-testid='hero-slide-1', data-testid='admin-add-gallery-btn'.
